title: AlarmHistoryItem
description: Represents the history of a specific alarm.

AlarmName.description: The descriptive name for the alarm.

AlarmType.description: The type of alarm, either metric alarm or composite alarm.

Timestamp.description: The time stamp for the alarm history item.

HistoryItemType.description: The type of alarm history item.

HistorySummary.description: A summary of the alarm history, in text format.

HistoryData.description: Data about the alarm, in JSON format.
